title: Generator Daily Checklist

sections.name: General Appearance
items: Is Generator visually in good condition and clean.
Is the area around the Plant Room free from any obstructions and walkway clear.

sections.name: Mechanical / Electrical
items: Have all operational functions of the Generator Been Tested.
Are all Hydraulic Hoses in good condition.
Is the electrical wiring in good condition.
Where Applicable are Electrical Cabinets free from Dust.

sections.name: Safety
items: Are all Machinery Guards in Place.
Is appropriate PPE available and worn at all times.

notes: Filename says Compressor, document text says Generator.
